name: Fudge Truffle Cheesecake-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Line the bottom of a springform pan with waxed paper.
3. For the crust, mix the cookie crumbs, melted butter, and sugar in a bowl. Press the mixture into the bottom of the pan.
4. For the filling, beat the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla extract until blended.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition just until blended.
6. Stir in the chopped chocolate.
7. Pour the filling over the crust.
8. Bake for 60-65 minutes or until the center is nearly set.
Note: Placing a pan of water in the oven helps keep it moist and reduces the likelihood of cracking.
